generated_exposure.exposure_text: I just don't see why we need to spend more on civil defense when we have so many other pressing needs. My neighbor lost her job last month, and now they want to cut her benefits to fund more emergency shelters. It's not like we're under immediate threat - this just feels like fearmongering to me. #Priorities #CivilDefense
